subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! In every Dispensation men received a more abundant portion from the ocean of divine bounties and the greater share [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه در هر کور رجال از بحر فیوضات نصیب اوفر بود و بهره اعظم الرجال
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
